synopsis:
Collecting issues #5-9 from The Mandalorian Season 2 Manga Series. Published in Japan on  24th of January 2025 and US on 13th of January 2026
The Mandalorian and the Child are on the run, and nowhere is safe!
The Mandalorian is a lone bounty hunter in charge of a baby known as The Child. Chased from planet to planet by the Imperial Remnant, the mismatched duo struggle to stay alive and stay together. On the planet Sorgan, the bounty hunter allies with a former Rebel to survive their shared enemies, but that’s just the beginning of his troubles...
Based on the series created by Jon Favreau and written by Jon Favreau, Dave Filoni, Christopher Yost, and Rick Famuyiwa
title: The Mandalorian Vol. 3 (Manga)
